model.name: Qwen3-32B-AWQ W4A16 weight + FP16 KV official 128K YaRN deployment

metadata.checkpoint_revision_note: This 2025-05-21 stable post-launch snapshot retains the original AWQ weight shards and includes the corrected architecture config, tokenizer, and model card. The raw upload briefly carried inconsistent context and cache fields and must not be used as the architecture source.
metadata.architecture_summary: Dense causal decoder-only Transformer with 64 SwiGLU layers, full-context GQA, Q/K RMSNorm, RoPE, pre-RMSNorm, and untied input embedding and LM head. The official AWQ checkpoint quantizes all seven Linear operators in every Transformer block to asymmetric group-wise INT4 while embedding, LM head, and normalization tensors remain unquantized. One checkpoint supports both thinking and non-thinking serving modes.

architecture.position_encoding: RoPE; static YaRN factor 4 for the selected 128K service profile

checkpoint_tensor_inventory.i32_interpretation: The Hugging Face API expands packed AWQ qweight tensors to their logical original weight count. I32 therefore denotes packed containers in the artifact, not a 32-bit model precision. Physical capacity follows the pinned safetensors tensor shapes and data offsets.

weight_capacity.capacity_note: total_weight_capacity_bytes is the strict sum of all four pinned shard tensor data ranges: packed INT4 qweight, unquantized BF16 original parameters, BF16 group scales, and packed asymmetric zero points. The pinned index metadata.total_size is 13107200 bytes larger than this closed tensor inventory and is retained only as an audited discrepancy; it is not used to force the capacity result. Tokenizer files and safetensors container overhead are excluded.

metadata.parameter_count_convention: The engine counts all Q/K/V/O and SwiGLU projection matrices plus the complete untied LM head for each Decode token, giving 31983534080 active matrix elements. The separate input embedding contributes one 5120-element 16-bit row read per request. RMSNorm, Q/K norm, RoPE and YaRN, softmax, AWQ unpack/dequantization, activation functions, sampling, and other elementwise work are outside matrix-parameter FLOPs.

precision_profile.transformer_block_linear_weight_dtype: asymmetric INT4 packed in I32 containers
precision_profile.zero_point_storage: eight asymmetric INT4 zero points packed per I32 container
precision_profile.runtime_unquantized_tensor_dtype: float16 according to pinned torch_dtype and dtype=auto serving path
precision_profile.weight_precision_evidence: The pinned quantization config declares 4-bit AWQ, group size 128, asymmetric zero points, and no explicit Linear exclusion list. The shard inventory contains exactly 448 qweight/qzero/scale triples, equal to Q/K/V/O and gate/up/down across all 64 layers; embedding, head, and normalization weights remain ordinary BF16 tensors.
precision_profile.activation_precision_evidence: AWQ is a weight-only W4A16 format. The pinned config declares torch_dtype=float16, and the official vLLM/SGLang serving commands do not override it.
precision_profile.kv_precision_evidence: The checkpoint has no KV quantization scheme and declares torch_dtype=float16. The official 2025 deployment commands do not supply a KV dtype override; vLLM's automatic KV path follows the model dtype. This selected deployment profile therefore uses FP16 KV.
precision_profile.quantization_metadata_capacity: Each group of 128 logical INT4 weights has one BF16 scale and one asymmetric 4-bit zero point. Their exact 609484800-byte payload is included in total_weight_capacity_bytes.
precision_profile.quantization_metadata_traffic: The current schema cannot express zero-FLOP, once-per-decode-step AWQ scale and zero-point traffic that is shared by the batch. Engine weight_read_bytes therefore contains packed matrix payload only. Adding metadata as a parameter group would create false FLOPs, while fixed_cost would repeat it per request.
precision_profile.runtime_quantization_note: INT4 unpack/dequantization arithmetic, activation casts, kernel padding, temporary buffers, and on-chip scale residency are outside the current static logical-HBM boundary.

context_profile.selected_service_profile: Official static YaRN factor 4 with original_max_position_embeddings=32768 and max_model_len=131072

metadata.context_note: The model card distinguishes three values: native context is 32768; the checkpoint default 40960 reserves a typical 8192-token prompt plus up to 32768 output tokens; and the advertised 131072 service limit requires the official static YaRN factor-4 override. This configuration uses the documented 128K-capable deployment because context is a historical trend variable. YaRN changes positional processing but not the engine's full-attention or KV shape formulas.
metadata.deployment_evidence_note: The official model card supplies vLLM and SGLang AWQ server commands and reports AWQ quality results in both thinking and non-thinking modes. The official speed benchmark exercises the long-context AWQ deployment path. A current Hugging Face download count is only a propagation proxy, not a 2025 token-share measurement.

adoption_observation.interpretation: Current propagation proxy only; not a historical 2025 snapshot and not deployment or token share.

metadata.thinking_mode_note: Thinking and non-thinking use the same checkpoint and per-token architecture. The mode changes the number of generated Decode steps and the context trajectory, not the static workload formula for one Decode token at fixed C and B.
metadata.revision_pin_warning: Do not reconstruct this sample from the initial upload config or from a future main revision. Use 0499c3ac83fdef8810b907a23894ba91e95eddd8: its config has 64 layers, max_position_embeddings=40960, full attention, use_cache=true, and the launch AWQ weight shards.
metadata.embedding_note: Input embedding and LM head are not tied. Capacity includes both full 151936-by-5120 BF16 checkpoint matrices. At runtime this profile uses 16-bit tensors; Decode reads one 10240-byte input row per request, while the full 16-bit LM head is read once per scheduler step and amortized across B outputs.
metadata.implementation_note: The logical-superchip baseline excludes tensor/pipeline-parallel communication, collective traffic, kernel padding, temporary activation materialization, framework workspace, sampling, and speculative-decoding auxiliaries.
